seo.title: Card Fee Savings Calculator — see what processors are taking
seo.description: Free B2B card fee savings calculator. See how much your business pays processors per year — and how much diBoaS could save.

hero.headline: What are card processors taking from your business?
hero.subtitle: Most merchants pay 2.5–3% on every card transaction. See what that adds up to.

inputs.monthlyVolumeHelp: Total card revenue your business processes per month
inputs.processorFeeHelp: Typical North American blended rate is ~2.9%

output.caveat: Real savings depend on your customer mix; this is an upper-bound estimate.

vignette.subtitle: Same revenue. Different processor. Big difference.
